message:
refactor(tests): migrate E2E TUI + provider streaming from mocks to VCR

Replace hand-built mock HTTP helpers with deterministic VCR cassette
infrastructure, continuing the mock-free testing strategy (bd-3loz).

E2E TUI changes:
- Remove MockHttpResponse/MockHttpServer imports
- Add VCR_BASIC_CHAT_* constants for simple no-tools chat scenario
- New vcr_interactive_args_no_tools() for minimal extension-free runs
- Refactor build_vcr_system_prompt() into generic
  build_vcr_system_prompt_for_args() accepting custom args functions
- New write_vcr_basic_chat_cassette() generating full SSE event
  sequence cassettes for chat interactions
- Delete build_mock_anthropic_text_sse() and ~300 lines of mock helpers

Provider streaming changes:
- Replace normalize_mock_error_cassette() with generate_error_fixture():
  builds deterministic VCR error cassettes matching AnthropicProvider's
  serialization format for each error status code (400/401/403/429/500/529)
- Remove MockHttpResponse import, add Interaction/RecordedResponse/
  UserContent imports for fixture generation

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
